changelog: New: Game Search — search Roblox games by name, see thumbnails, player count, ratings, launch directly
New: Player Join/Leave Tracker — real-time player activity feed from Roblox logs
New: FastFlag Profiles — save and load named flag configurations for quick switching
New: Cache Cleaner — scan and clean Roblox logs, cache, temp files with size display
New: Game Thumbnails — favorites and history now show game icons from Roblox API
Fix: Game Search routes through bypass proxy when session is active
Fix: Proper error messages for API timeouts and connection failures
